LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-26-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE REAL ESTATE LLC'S MOTION AND PETITION TO CONFIRM AND CORRECT CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING, MODIFYING IT TO STATE THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED, AS OPPOSED TO "PETITIONER'S UNOPPOSED PETITION IS GRANTED". PETITIONER'S UNOPPOSED "PETITION TO CONFIRM AND CORRECT CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD" IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Continued To May-22-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Petition To Confirm And Correct Contractual Arbitration Award For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. JOHN KONTRABECKI, Esq. of TKG International (Tel: 415-416-6860) for Plaintiff.
Atty. DENISE PRITCHARD, Esq. of Schinner & Shain LLP (Tel: 415-369-9050) for Defendant (via zoom videoconference).

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE REAL ESTATE LLC's Motion And Petition To Confirm And Correct Contractual Arbitration Award For Declaratory Relief.

Matter discussed. The Court holds a discussion regarding the lack of opposition. Counsel Pritchard states an opposition was not filed due to an oversight. Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling, modifying it to state the motion is granted and no opposition was filed, as opposed to "Petitioner's unopposed petition is granted".

Petitioner's unopposed "petition to confirm and correct contractual arbitration award" is granted.

Order signed. (See signed order for complete ruling).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported.(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
